ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on Wednesday, 17 May from 01:00 AM to 04:00 AM UTC. During this window the VPN service will be unavailable.

To ensure uninterrupted access to our internal resources, please:
1. Log in to the VPN portal using your corporate credentials.
2. Update your VPN client to the latest version (download link: <URL>).
3. Verify that your device’s firewall allows outbound traffic on ports 1194 and 443.

If you encounter any connectivity issues after the maintenance window, contact the IT Help Desk immediately at helpdesk@example.com or call extension 1234.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Scholarship Award – Verify Your Enrollment
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! Your application for the Global Scholars Fellowship has been approved. To receive your full scholarship of $15,000, you must confirm your enrollment details by the end of this week.

Please review the attached enrollment form (Link: <URL>) and submit the required documents (passport copy, proof of address, and a signed consent form) to the scholarship office. Failure to submit the documents within 48 hours will result in forfeiture of your award.

If you have already completed the verification process, please disregard this message. For any questions, reply directly to this email or call the scholarship hotline: 1‑800‑SCHOLAR.

We look forward to welcoming you to our university community.

Sincerely,
Office of International Students
University of Global Excellence
